subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! His honor Qábil, seeker and aspirant, longeth that a glance of loving-kindness be cast upon that perfect beloved one. This is evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی جناب قابل سائل و آمل که نظر محبتی بان حبیب کامل گردد این معلومست
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
